overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a futuristic dystopian city. The player character traverses city streets, descends a graffiti-covered stairway into an underground passage illuminated by red neon lights, and emerges back to street level beneath an elevated overpass. The environment features towering skyscrapers, digital billboards, futuristic vehicles, and cyberpunk aesthetic elements.

events.description: pedestrian with pink hair passes close to the camera on the right
futuristic black car drives past on the road from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the city sidewalk past pedestrians and observing the street traffic

sleek black futuristic car driving along the street

metal barrier painted orange blocking off a construction area
tall industrial pole with overhead lighting fixture
large illuminated screen displaying colorful advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city street at night, with the camera walking along a concrete sidewalk. Tall office buildings rise in the background while an orange construction barrier lines the left side. A pedestrian with distinctive pink hair passes by, and a sleek black futuristic car drives along the road. The environment is lit by street lamps and the glow of digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner transition to underground stairway

events.description: turns right off the main street toward a stairway entrance
begins descending the concrete stairs into the underground area

agents.ego_description: turning off the main sidewalk and approaching a stairway leading down between concrete walls

notable_agents.action: futuristic sports car parked near the stairway entrance

entered.detail: concrete stairs descending between high walls leading underground
gray concrete wall with red painted base trim

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right off the main street into a narrower, more enclosed area leading to a stairway. The sky becomes mostly obscured by surrounding structures. A futuristic sports car is parked near the entrance as the character begins descending the concrete stairs, leaving the main street behind.

events.description: enters dimly lit stairwell with colorful graffiti on the walls
reaches the bottom of the stairs and enters the underground corridor

agents.ego_description: walking down concrete stairs surrounded by graffiti art and illuminated advertisement screens

entered.detail: descending staircase with gray concrete steps and walls
colorful street art including a large red hand figure and abstract designs
multiple glowing digital billboards advertising burritos and other products
scattered paper, cardboard, and litter covering the ground

segments.scene_description: The character descends a long concrete stairwell completely enclosed from the outside. The walls are covered in vibrant graffiti murals, including a prominent red hand figure. Digital advertisement screens glow at the bottom of the stairs, illuminating the trash-strewn ground. The environment transitions from outdoor city street to indoor underground passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground service corridor with red neon lighting

events.description: enters corridor illuminated by intense red neon ceiling lights
approaching the exit at the far end of the corridor, daylight visible

agents.ego_description: walking through a dimly lit underground corridor with red neon strips casting red light on the walls

entered.detail: long strips of red neon lighting running along the ceiling casting red glow
illuminated vending machine with colorful product display
thick cylindrical pillars supporting the ceiling structure

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an underground service corridor bathed in intense red neon light from strips on the ceiling. The walls are plain concrete with some graffiti, and the floor is littered with debris. A vending machine stands against the left wall, and large support pillars line the path. The corridor leads toward a visible exit at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: exits the underground passage back to street level under an overpass
futuristic cars drive past on the road under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk under an elevated roadway with traffic passing by on the right

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving along the road under the overpass
distant figure walking along the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure spanning across the road overhead
contemporary building with glass windows and neon signage
multi-lane asphalt street with moving traffic
large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the underground passage back to street level, now walking beneath a massive elevated highway overpass. The area is lit by streetlights and the glow of digital billboards on nearby buildings. Traffic moves along the road to the right, and the sidewalk continues under the concrete overpass structure. The environment transitions from enclosed underground back to the open urban streetscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a bright, open futuristic city street into the claustrophobic depths of a graffiti-covered underground passage. It begins by walking along a concrete sidewalk flanked by towering office buildings and orange construction barriers, passing a pink-haired pedestrian and a sleek black car under the glow of digital billboards. As the camera turns right away from the main road, the open sky is gradually obscured by surrounding structures, leading past a parked sports car toward a concrete stairway. The scene then shifts from the outdoor urban environment to an enclosed descent, where the walls transition into vibrant graffiti murals featuring a prominent red hand. Finally, the camera reaches the bottom of the stairwell, where the lighting changes to the artificial glare of digital advertisement screens illuminating a trash-strewn underground floor.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a claustrophobic, neon-lit underground corridor into the expansive scale of a futuristic city street. It begins by traversing a concrete service passage bathed in intense red light from ceiling strips, passing by a lone vending machine and debris-strewn floors. As the camera moves forward between heavy support pillars, the enclosed space opens up toward a distant exit. The scene then shifts as the character emerges from the tunnel back to street level, transitioning from the red glow into the cool light of streetlamps and digital billboards. Finally, the view expands beneath a massive elevated highway overpass, where the sidewalk runs alongside the flow of urban traffic under the towering concrete structure.
